subject: Welcome to Your New Health Plan
body: Welcome to Healthco! We're thrilled to partner with you on your health journey. With the Healthco Complete Care PPO, you have broad network access and affordable care. Remember to download your digital ID card from our portal, review your coverage details, and select a Primary Care Provider to get the most out of your new benefits. Let's make this your healthiest year yet!

subject: Understanding Your Benefits: Deductibles Explained
body: Navigating health insurance can be confusing, but Healthco is here to help. Your deductible is the amount you pay for covered health care services before your insurance plan starts to pay. The good news? Preventive services like your annual check-up, immunizations, and many common lab tests are covered 100% even before you meet your deductible. Check your member dashboard today to see your current balance and maximize your savings.

subject: Time for Your Annual Wellness Visit
body: Prevention is the best medicine. With your Healthco plan, your annual wellness visit represents no out-of-pocket cost to you. Schedule your check-up today to review your overall health, get necessary preventive screenings, and discuss any concerns with your doctor. Catching issues early leads to better outcomes. Log into your Healthco portal to find an in-network provider near you and book your appointment.

subject: Save Money with Mail Order Prescriptions
body: Taking maintenance medications? You could be saving time and money with Healthco's mail-order pharmacy program. Get a 90-day supply of your regular prescriptions delivered right to your door, often at a lower copay than picking them up monthly at a retail pharmacy. It's convenient, reliable, and cost-effective. Enroll online today through your member dashboard and never wait in the pharmacy line again.

subject: Join the Wellness Rewards Program Today
body: Get rewarded for living well! The Healthco Wellness Rewards Program lets you earn points for taking proactive steps toward your health. Whether it's getting your flu shot, completing a digital health risk assessment, or logging daily steps, your healthy choices add up. Redeem your points for gift cards, fitness gear, or premium discounts. Sign up for free through the Healthco mobile app and start earning today.
